anticheat_invariant: flags OFF => zero twitch/ml/net/db imports in voice process, no sidecar, main byte-identical

slices.title: config section + flags + anticheat blocklist + boot canary + flag-off regression
slices.accept: twitch Pydantic section (extra=forbid), KENNING_TWITCH_* default-OFF; test_anticheat blocklist += requests/aiohttp/websockets/sqlite_vec/llama_cpp-main/transformers-main; 'twitch posture: OFF' canary; test asserts zero twitch imports + frozen-24 unchanged

slices.title: twitch sidecar skeleton (clone embedder_server) + .venv-twitch + orphan-guard test
slices.accept: loopback bind, parent-death deadman, sidecar_lock boot-reap, fail-quiet; orphan-guardrail test mirroring tests/subprocess/test_orphan_guardrails.py; no port bound when flag OFF

slices.title: OAuth lifecycle (Device Code Flow) + secure ~/.kenning/twitch.json + secret-deny
slices.accept: device-code + refresh + /validate + revocation; atomic+fsync rotation-safe store; gitignored + pre-push secret-deny; tests vs mocked endpoints

slices.title: stdlib RFC6455 EventSub read client + dedup LRU + ring buffer
slices.accept: handshake/frames/auto-PONG/receive-only/10s-subscribe-or-die/keepalive/overlap-swap-reconnect + message-id dedup; tests vs synthetic frames; rejects app frames

slices.title: L1 deterministic normalize + blocklist (anticheat-clean)
slices.accept: frozen normalize_for_match (codepoint allowlist strip incl Tags/bidi/VS/ZW/CGJ, NFKC, casefold, TR39 skeleton, leet, separator/repeat collapse, transliterate) + dual-scan (skeleton+NFKC+reversed) + Double-Metaphone/RapidFuzz hard-slur + hot-reload YAML + validator; FNR==0 on hard set, bounded benign FPR golden

slices.title: guard sidecar (GGUF/llama.cpp) + safe/unsafe canary + VRAM-admission gate
slices.accept: model-family-aware prompt (Llama-Guard-3-1B default), loopback; chat-mode refuses enable unless guard resident + canary passes; pynvml admission; tests vs mocked guard (real model = user-provisioned)

slices.title: L0-L7 ChatSafetyValidator arbiter (dry-run) + red-team CI gate
slices.accept: extends safety/validator.py over ChatMessageContext; L1+L1.5+L2+L3+L5(reassembly+structural+Detoxify+guard-exchange)+deflection+trajectory scanner+two-stage cascade+AuditLog(logs/twitch_mod_audit.jsonl); red-team corpus gate in run_tests.py (phonetic/acrostic/unicode/multilingual/injection/crescendo/roleplay/metadata) FNR==0 on L1 set + composed leak budget; model rules fail-CLOSED when unavailable

slices.title: team-isolation hard wall (provenance taint + orchestrator enforcement + tests)
slices.accept: taint enum (LOCAL_VOICE/TWITCH_CHAT/REDEEM/SYSTEM) extending safety/taint.py; enforce at play_to_device/_maybe_handle_relay_speech (invert force=True fail-open @orchestrator.py:3744); separately-named chat BroadcastSink != relay device; static import-graph + PTT-spy + adversarial-route tests; existing behavior byte-identical (default LOCAL_VOICE)

slices.title: overlay HTTP+WS server + textContent/CSP HTML + CLIP-THAT marker + hype-train/goal reactions
slices.accept: 127.0.0.1 + per-session token, strict CSP, textContent-only, WS schema validation, XSS test feeding payloads as every metadata field; Stream Marker on command; hype-train v2 reaction + boot version assertion; every overlay/spoken string through L1+L6

slices.title: economy SQLite-WAL ledger + provably-fair RNG + spin-the-wheel/slots/games
slices.accept: append-only event-sourced ledger (synchronous=FULL, idempotency keys, rebuildable); commit-reveal HMAC-SHA256 RNG (!verify), outcome server-side before animation; double-spend/race/crash-recovery + fairness tests; lose-ALL segment AT-4-gated default-OFF

slices.title: addressing (deterministic-first) + selection engine + chat-reply through L0-L7 sandwich
slices.accept: metadata-first addressing (reply/mention/badges/!-prefix, embedder residual, fail-closed-ignore, immutable user_id) + 6-stage selection (dedupe/cluster/prioritize/token-budget pinned safety reserve) + per-chatter isolated CHATTER_N generation -> L6 -> L7 -> chat BroadcastSink ONLY; admission funnel + GPU priority + callout canary; addressing precision/recall + no-truncate-reserve + callout-never-starved tests

slices.title: Helix client + voice-commanded moderation + 2nd-monitor review loop
slices.accept: self-idempotent Helix (ban/timeout/delete/automod/chat-settings, rate governor); roster login->user_id resolution card (no auto-pick on ambiguity), role/self guard, mass-action breaker, two-phase read-back, TTS->STT loopback suppression; 8B never in action loop; review popup (reuse streaming/window.py) + immutable twitch_actions.jsonl; tests vs mocked Helix

slices.title: remaining games/redeems + channel-points manager + helper model + content-ops
slices.accept: heist/duel/trivia/raffle; channel-point CRUD (create-and-own, 50-cap, queued-vs-skip, CANCELED-refund) through unified sanitizer; Qwen2.5 helper (CPU, grammar-constrained closed-enum authz, moderation unreachable, default-OFF); content-ops (highlight scorer + deferred clip/title/recap, NO capture); ChatEvent/ChatSource seam; inferred DND BusyEstimator

slices.title: speak-to-team redeem (HARDEST-GATED, default-OFF, AT-4)
slices.accept: own flag default-OFF, NO hotkey binding, ranked-disabled; Tier A enumerated LOW-TACTICAL templates via _parse_callout_slots (never 8B), allowlist checked in TRUSTED relay process, through audited _shape_for_team->PTT->B1; Tier B free-text always manual-approve-with-preview (timeout=REJECT+refund); redeem sidecar holds no B1/PTT handle; ship only if exact-match-deterministic
